title: Cyberimplants
description: The modification adds cyberware and was created inspired by Cyberpunk 2077 and Cyberpunk Edgerunners.
body:
[Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyberimplants) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cyberimplants)

## ![cyberimplants_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ecd02e93bb3d7fafa7ba4ec7125fd534f2f5f5.png)

Cyberimplants is a modification inspired by the game Cyberpunk 2077, as well as the anime Cyberpunk Edgerunners. The modification is aimed at entertainment, a variety of gameplay content, and just a desire to combine 2 different games.

## Changelog


<details>
<summary>Previously added</summary>

### 0.1.0
- **Optics V1.** Allows you to see the amount of cyberdeck memory. You can buy it at the shop (version 0.2.0).
- **Cyberdeck V1.** It accommodates malware inside it without harming the host and use it against its adversaries. You can buy it at the shop (version 0.2.0).
- **Malware V1.** Placed in Cyberdeck and used on an opponent. You can buy it at the shop (version 0.2.0).

### 0.2.0
- **Smartphone.** Allows you to buy implants.
> - **AppStore.** Needed to download applications.
> - **Bank.** Allows you to view the balance.
> - **Store.** Allows you to buy implants and hacking cards.
> - **Settings.** Decorative app.
- **Commands.**
> - **Getbalance.** The getbalance command allows you to add a certain amount to the account of the player entering this command.

</details>

### 0.3.2
- **Smartphone.**
> - **Fortune** Opportunity to earn or lose your money completely. Odds: 70% to fail, 28% to return the bet, 2% to double the bet. Maximum possible bet 500 €$. Note: Only play after purchasing Energy Arm, otherwise there is a chance of completely draining your smartphone and never charging it again.
> - **Wallpaper.** Adds the ability to change the desktop wallpaper. Only two desktop screensavers are available at this time.
> - **Store.** The store interface has been redesigned.
> - **Powering Smartphone.** Now the phone will lose its charge until it is completely switched off.
> - **Localisation.** The smartphone is now also available in two languages. Supported languages: English and Russian.
- **Cyberware.**
> - **Energy Arm V1.** Needed to charge your smartphone. You can buy it at the shop.
- **Technical part.**
> - **Re-creating a modification.** Items and money are saved when you upgrade to a new version. However, you will have to install the apps.
> - **Localisation.** Fixed some bugs.
- **Commands.**
> - **Editbalance.** The getbalance command has been changed to editbalance. The command now not only increases balance, but also decreases it. The command can also set the balance to a certain value.

## Supported languages

1. English
1. Russian
